# Auth тАФ what shipped

Build-2 / 06-auth: implements the last roadmap item. Authentication is now in scope.

## Library chosen

**Better Auth `^1.6.9`** with `@better-auth/cli` for schema generation. Picked over Auth.js v5 because the project's architecture doc already named Better Auth, the Prisma adapter is first-class, and the magic-link plugin is built in.

Adapter: `better-auth/adapters/prisma` against `@cardinalxchange/db`'s singleton Prisma client.

## What ships

### Schema (Prisma)

Generated by `npx @better-auth/cli generate`, then layered with project-specific fields:

- `User` (`@@map("user")`) тАФ Better Auth standard fields plus `displayName VARCHAR(80)`, `role UserRole`, `deletedAt`. The `deletedAt` index supports the public profile filter.
- `Session` (`@@map("session")`)
- `Account` (`@@map("account")`)
- `Verification` (`@@map("verification")`) тАФ magic-link tokens.
- `Question.authorId` / `Answer.authorId` тАФ nullable FK to `user.id`, `onDelete: SetNull`. Existing rows stay anonymous.
- New enum `UserRole { STUDENT, MODERATOR }`.

Migration: `packages/db/prisma/migrations/20260505043616_add_better_auth/`.

### Auth wiring

- `apps/web/backend/auth/auth.ts` тАФ `betterAuth()` with `prismaAdapter`, `magicLink` plugin (stanford.edu guard inside `sendMagicLink`), `nextCookies` plugin.
- `apps/web/backend/auth/session.ts` тАФ `getViewerFromSession()` / `requireViewer()` / `AuthRequiredError`. The seam services use; nothing else may call `auth.api.getSession()` directly.
- `apps/web/app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts` тАФ `toNextJsHandler(auth)` mount.
- `apps/web/middleware.ts` тАФ session-cookie redirect for `/settings`.

### Identity seam

`apps/web/backend/viewer/viewer.ts` now reads the live session and falls back to anonymous. `AUTH_DEV_BYPASS=1` keeps the `DEV_VIEWER_*` env shortcut for local development.

Write routes 401 when `viewer.isAuthenticated === false`:

- `POST /api/questions`
- `POST /api/questions/[id]/answers`
- `POST /api/cxc-ai`
- `PATCH /api/users/me`
- `DELETE /api/users/me`

GETs stay public.

### UI

- `app/(auth)/login` route group with its own minimal layout + `loading.tsx` / `error.tsx`.
- `frontend/features/auth/components/login-form.tsx` тАФ Stanford SSO button (placeholder, disabled with tooltip until Stanford IT shares SAML metadata), email magic-link form (stanford.edu only).
- `frontend/features/shell/components/user-menu.tsx` тАФ avatar dropdown with profile / settings / sign-out. Renders a "Sign in" link when anonymous.
- `TopCommandBar` тАФ Ask Question now redirects through `/login?next=/ask` when signed out.
- `app/(forum)/users/[userId]/page.tsx` тАФ public profile (avatar, display name, joined date, asked/answered counts, recent questions and answers). Soft-deleted users 404.
- `app/(forum)/settings/page.tsx` тАФ display-name editor + soft-delete with type-to-confirm.
- `app/api/users/me/route.ts` тАФ GET / PATCH / DELETE for the current viewer.

### Env vars (`.env.example`)

```
BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=
BETTER_AUTH_URL=http://localhost:3000

# Stanford SSO placeholders тАФ IT fills these in production secrets.
STANFORD_SAML_ENTITY_ID=
STANFORD_SAML_SSO_URL=
STANFORD_SAML_CERT=
STANFORD_OIDC_ISSUER=
STANFORD_OIDC_CLIENT_ID=
STANFORD_OIDC_CLIENT_SECRET=

# Magic-link transport. Empty in dev (link is logged to console).
EMAIL_SERVER_HOST=
EMAIL_SERVER_PORT=587
EMAIL_SERVER_USER=
EMAIL_SERVER_PASSWORD=
EMAIL_FROM=no-reply@cardinalxchange.local
```

Plus `AUTH_DEV_BYPASS=1` (optional) to honor `DEV_VIEWER_*` when no real session exists.

### Tests

- `apps/web/backend/http/__tests__/inputs.test.ts` тАФ `parseUpdateUserProfileInput` covering trim, null clear, max length, non-string rejection.
- `apps/web/backend/viewer/__tests__/viewer.test.ts` тАФ `getViewer()` with the auth seam mocked: session passthrough, name fallback, anonymous result, dev-bypass behavior.
- `apps/web/frontend/features/auth/components/__tests__/login-form.test.tsx` тАФ render + stanford-only guard + happy path + API error path.
- The questions/answers service tests now mock `@/backend/viewer` and assert the new 401-on-anonymous + `authorId` threading.

97 tests pass across the workspace.

### Verification

- `pnpm typecheck` тАФ green.
- `pnpm lint` тАФ green.
- `pnpm test` тАФ 97 passed (16 files).
- `pnpm build` тАФ all routes compile, including `/api/auth/[...all]`, `/api/users/me`, `/login`, `/users/[userId]`, `/settings`, and the middleware.
- `pnpm --filter @cardinalxchange/db prisma:dev --name add_better_auth` тАФ applied cleanly against the local Postgres on `:54322`.

## Open questions / blockers

1. **Stanford SAML metadata.** The `Sign in with Stanford` button is intentionally disabled with a placeholder tooltip until Stanford IT shares Entity ID, SSO URL, and signing certificate. Better Auth's SSO plugin slots in once those land. Do **not** commit production credentials тАФ they live in deploy-time secrets only.
2. **SMTP transport.** Magic links print to the server console in dev. Production needs an SMTP transport тАФ Mailtrap / Postmark / SES are all viable. Add `nodemailer` (or the Better Auth email-plugin equivalent) to `apps/web` when wiring this.
3. **Display-name vs Better Auth's `name` field.** We layer `displayName` on the User model so users can choose how they appear without touching their Stanford-issued name. The settings page edits `displayName`; existing question/answer rows use `authorName` strings unchanged. Future iteration could reflect a renamed user across their old posts via a backfill job, but that's out of scope here.
4. **Soft-delete vs hard-delete.** `softDeleteUser` scrubs PII and stamps `deletedAt`. The FK is `SetNull` so a hard-delete still works if we ever decide to. Profile pages filter `deletedAt: null`. We do not currently scrub `authorName`/`authorMeta` on existing posts; doing so would require an explicit cascade.
5. **Username/handle.** Not added. Profiles route via `/users/[userId]` (cuid). If we want `/users/@handle`, that's a follow-up with a uniqueness migration.

## Where to find it in the repo

| Concern            | Path                                                                                                     |
| ------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Better Auth config | `apps/web/backend/auth/auth.ts`                                                                          |
| Session reader     | `apps/web/backend/auth/session.ts`                                                                       |
| Identity seam      | `apps/web/backend/viewer/viewer.ts`                                                                      |
| API mount          | `apps/web/app/api/auth/[...all]/route.ts`                                                                |
| Middleware         | `apps/web/middleware.ts`                                                                                 |
| Login UI           | `apps/web/app/(auth)/login/`, `apps/web/frontend/features/auth/components/login-form.tsx`                |
| Profile page       | `apps/web/app/(forum)/users/[userId]/page.tsx`                                                           |
| Settings page      | `apps/web/app/(forum)/settings/page.tsx`, `apps/web/frontend/features/auth/components/settings-form.tsx` |
| Users API          | `apps/web/app/api/users/me/route.ts`, `apps/web/backend/users/users.service.ts`                          |
| Schema             | `packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma`, migration `20260505043616_add_better_auth`                           |

## Commits in this build

1. `revert(db): drop NextAuth-shaped auth tables` тАФ reverted the initial Auth.js scaffolding once the coordinator pivoted to Better Auth.
2. `feat(db): add Better Auth tables (user, session, account, verification)` тАФ schema + migration.
3. `feat(auth): wire Better Auth with magic-link plugin (stanford.edu)` тАФ backend/auth, frontend/auth-client, API mount, middleware, env vars.
4. `feat(viewer): replace getViewer() stub with real session` тАФ viewer + service guards + db `authorId` plumbing.
5. `feat(auth-ui): login page, user menu, sign-out flow` тАФ login UI, top-bar UserMenu, redirect-on-ask.
6. `feat(profile): public /users/[id] profile + private /settings page` тАФ users service, pages, /api/users/me.
7. `chore: mark Better Auth as in-scope across CLAUDE.md, architecture.md, STRUCTURE.md` тАФ docs.
8. `test: auth smoke tests (zod parser, viewer, login form)`.
